inputs.businessContext: Average heart rate during the session.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average heart rate during the session.

businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia cardíaca promedio durante la sesión.

inputs.label: Resting Heart Rate
inputs.businessContext: Resting heart rate measured in the morning.

businessContext_i18n.en: Resting heart rate measured in the morning.

inputs.label: Maximum Heart Rate
inputs.businessContext: Maximum heart rate from a stress test or age-predicted (220-age).

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum heart rate from a stress test or age-predicted (220-age).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Stres testinden veya yaşa göre tahmin edilen (220-yaş) maksimum kalp atış hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale Herzfrequenz aus einem Belastungstest oder altersgeschätzt (220-Alter).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence cardiaque maximale issue d'un test d'effort ou estimée par l'âge (220-âge).
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia cardíaca máxima de una prueba de esfuerzo o estimada por edad (220-edad).
businessContext_i18n.ar: أقصى معدل لضربات القلب من اختبار الإجهاد أو حسب العمر (220-العمر).

inputs.label: Gender-Specific Factor
inputs.businessContext: Exponential factor: 0.64 for males, 0.86 for females per Banister TRIMP.

businessContext_i18n.en: Exponential factor: 0.64 for males, 0.86 for females per Banister TRIMP.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üstel faktör: Banister TRIMP'e göre erkekler için 0,64, kadınlar için 0,86.
businessContext_i18n.de: Exponentialfaktor: 0,64 für Männer, 0,86 für Frauen nach Banister TRIMP.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur exponentiel : 0,64 pour les hommes, 0,86 pour les femmes selon le TRIMP de Banister.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor exponencial: 0.64 para hombres, 0.86 para mujeres según Banister TRIMP.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل أسي: 0.64 للذكور، 0.86 للإناث وفقًا لـ Banister TRIMP.
